info.title: DealerMAX Dealer Public API
info.description: Public REST API for DealerMax dealers to access their own vehicle inventory, long-term rental (NLT) offers, and DealerMax-generated dealer content such as FAQ, news, glossary, guides, videos and podcasts. Authentication via X-Api-Key header (issued from the DealerMax dashboard). Three services on the same uniform contract: REWIND (used vehicles for sale), NOS (used vehicles for rent without scoring), NLT (long-term rental offers). The public contract exposes dealer-ready read-only resources only: inventory listing/details plus content hub, search, listing and detail resources. Cost included in the DealerMax monthly subscription (no per-request billing). License: MIT for spec and examples. Curated docs and JSON examples: https://developers.dealermax.app/api

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Inventory surface: REWIND, NOS, or NLT.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number, starting at 1.

parameters.name: page_size
parameters.description: Items per page, from 1 to 100.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Optional text search over make, model, and version.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <DEALERMAX_API_KEY>`. Alternative to the X-Api-Key header.

parameters.name: X-Api-Key
parameters.description: Dealer API key (preferred). Send your key in this header. Mutually exclusive with the Authorization Bearer header.

200.description: Paginated vehicle or NLT offer listing for the authenticated dealer.

400.description: Invalid service, content type, or detail identifier.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired dealer API key.

404.description: Dealer, vehicle, offer, or content item not found.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry-After is provided.

get.description: List the authenticated dealer's inventory — used vehicles for sale (REWIND), used vehicles for rent (NOS), or long-term rental offers (NLT) — paginated, for a single service.

parameters.name: service
parameters.description: Inventory surface: REWIND, NOS, or NLT.

parameters.name: id_auto
parameters.description: Vehicle UUID. Required for REWIND/NOS details and mutually exclusive with id_offerta.

parameters.name: id_offerta
parameters.description: NLT offer id. Required for NLT details and mutually exclusive with id_auto.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <DEALERMAX_API_KEY>`. Alternative to the X-Api-Key header.

parameters.name: X-Api-Key
parameters.description: Dealer API key (preferred). Send your key in this header. Mutually exclusive with the Authorization Bearer header.

200.description: Single vehicle or NLT offer detail for the authenticated dealer.

400.description: Invalid service, content type, or detail identifier.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired dealer API key.

404.description: Dealer, vehicle, offer, or content item not found.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry-After is provided.

get.description: Fetch the full detail of a single inventory item (a used vehicle or an NLT offer) belonging to the authenticated dealer.

parameters.description: Items per page, from 1 to 100.

parameters.description: Bearer authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <DEALERMAX_API_KEY>`. Alternative to the X-Api-Key header.

404.description: Dealer, vehicle, offer, or content item not found.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry-After is provided.

get.description: List the authenticated dealer's editorial content of a single type (news, guides, glossary or faq), paginated.

parameters.name: content_type
parameters.description: Dealer content type.

parameters.name: slug
parameters.description: Required public slug for a single content item.

parameters.name: authorization
parameters.description: Bearer authentication: `Authorization: Bearer <DEALERMAX_API_KEY>`. Alternative to the X-Api-Key header.

parameters.name: X-Api-Key
parameters.description: Dealer API key (preferred). Send your key in this header. Mutually exclusive with the Authorization Bearer header.

200.description: Single dealer content item selected by public slug.

400.description: Invalid service, content type, or detail identifier.

401.description: Missing, invalid, or expired dealer API key.

404.description: Dealer, vehicle, offer, or content item not found.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. Retry-After is provided.

get.description: Fetch a single editorial content item of the authenticated dealer, selected by its public slug.

DealerPublicProblemDetails.description: RFC 7807 problem+json error body returned by every Dealer Public API endpoint on failure.

type.description: Dereferenceable error documentation URL on developers.dealermax.app.

title.description: Short, human-readable summary of the error.

status.description: HTTP status code, repeated for convenience.

code.description: Stable machine-readable error code; pair it with the `type` URL to look up the error in the catalog.

detail.description: Human-readable explanation specific to this occurrence of the error.

request_id.description: Correlation id for this request, echoed in the X-Request-ID header; quote it in support tickets.

errors.description: Per-field validation errors, present only for validation_error (free-form JSON objects).

DealerPublicInventoryItem.description: One item in a dealer inventory listing. The shape is a union across the three services (selected by `service`): REWIND/NOS items carry `id_auto`, NLT items carry `id_offerta`.

id_auto.description: Vehicle UUID — present for REWIND/NOS used-vehicle items; absent for NLT offer items.

id_offerta.description: NLT offer id — present for NLT items; absent for REWIND/NOS vehicle items.

service.description: Inventory service this item belongs to: REWIND (used vehicles for sale), NOS (used vehicles for rent), or NLT (long-term rental offers).

nome_canonico.description: Canonical display name (brand + model + trim), ready to show to end users.

prezzo_vendita.description: Sale price in EUR, VAT included (REWIND). May be absent for non-sale services.

cover_url.description: Cover image URL for the item.

has_podcast.description: True if a DealerMAX-generated audio podcast is available for this item.

has_video.description: True if a DealerMAX-generated video is available for this item.

DealerPublicInventoryListingResponse.description: A paginated page of dealer inventory items for a single service.

service.description: Inventory service this page belongs to (REWIND, NOS or NLT).

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

has_next.description: True if a further page exists after this one.

DealerPublicVehicleDetail.description: Full detail of a single used vehicle (REWIND/NOS).

ai_content.description: DealerMAX-generated editorial content for the vehicle (free-form JSON object).

media_urls.description: Ordered list of media (image/video) URLs for the vehicle.

podcast.description: DealerMAX-generated podcast metadata, if available (free-form JSON object).

video.description: DealerMAX-generated video metadata, if available (free-form JSON object).

has_podcast.description: True if an audio podcast is available for this vehicle.

has_video.description: True if a video is available for this vehicle.

DealerPublicOfferDetail.description: Full detail of a single NLT (long-term rental) offer.

slug.description: URL-friendly unique slug identifying the offer.

quotazioni.description: Monthly-fee quotations across duration×km combinations (each a free-form JSON object).

DealerPublicInventoryDetailResponse.description: Detail envelope for a single inventory item: carries `vehicle` for REWIND/NOS used vehicles or `offer` for NLT rental offers, selected by `service`.

service.description: Service the detail belongs to (REWIND, NOS or NLT).

DealerPublicContentItem.description: One editorial content item (news, guide, glossary term or FAQ) published on the dealer site.

slug.description: URL-friendly unique slug identifying the content item.

topic.description: Topic / category the content item belongs to.

h1.description: Page H1 heading (may differ from the title).

meta_description.description: SEO meta description for the content page.

body_text_preview.description: Plain-text preview of the body (truncated; full body served on the dealer site).

url.description: Absolute URL of the content page on the dealer site.

updated_at.description: Timestamp of the last content update (ISO 8601).

DealerPublicContentListingResponse.description: A paginated page of editorial content items of a single content type.

content_type.description: Editorial content type of this page (news, guides, glossary or faq).

total.description: Total number of items across all pages.

has_next.description: True if a further page exists after this one.

q.description: Free-text query echoed back when the listing was filtered by search.

filters.description: Filters applied to the listing, echoed back (free-form JSON object).

meta.description: Identifying metadata about the dealer that owns the returned content.

dealer.description: The dealer the content belongs to.

brand_name.description: Dealer commercial brand name, as shown to end users.

DealerPublicContentDetailResponse.description: Detail envelope for a single editorial content item.

content_type.description: Editorial content type of the item (news, guides, glossary or faq).

meta.description: Identifying metadata about the dealer that owns the returned content.

dealer.description: The dealer the content belongs to.

brand_name.description: Dealer commercial brand name, as shown to end users.

DealerPublicContentHubResponse.description: Content hub: a preview section per content type for the dealer.

meta.description: Identifying metadata about the dealer that owns the returned content.

dealer.description: The dealer the content belongs to.

brand_name.description: Dealer commercial brand name, as shown to end users.

sections.description: One preview listing per content type, keyed by content type name.

DealerPublicContentSearchResponse.description: Cross-content-type search results for the dealer.

q.description: Free-text query that produced these results.

page_size_per_type.description: Maximum number of results returned per content type.

total.description: Total number of matching items across all content types.

by_type.description: Per-content-type match counts, keyed by content type name.

items.description: Matching content items, interleaved across content types.

meta.description: Identifying metadata about the dealer that owns the returned content.

dealer.description: The dealer the content belongs to.

brand_name.description: Dealer commercial brand name, as shown to end users.

tags.name: DealerPublicAPI
tags.description: Public REST API for individual dealers to access their own inventory, offers and DealerMax-generated content programmatically. Inventory services: REWIND (used vehicles for sale), NOS (used for rent without scoring), NLT (long-term rental offers / Noleggio Lungo Termine). Content resources: FAQ, news, glossary, guides, videos and podcasts.
